'''Lyric''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Melodie]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] trainee from [[Yavin 8/Legends|Yavin 8]]. She was the daughter of [[Gyle]].

==Biography==
Like the rest of her [[Species/Legends|species]], Lyric was hatched from an egg and lived the first twenty years of her life on land. She lived at [[Sistra Mountain|Sistra]], one of the [[Moon/Legends|moon's]] many purple mountains. Due to the dangerous conditions on her [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] and that she was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], her parents sent her to [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Jedi Praxeum]] on nearby [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].<ref name="jjk2" />

In [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]], Lyric turned twenty and had to undergo the [[Changing Ceremony]], in which young Melodies would change from land-dwellers to water-breathers, making them [[Elder (Melodie)|Elders]] (the adults of Melodie society). Since Yavin 8 was dangerous, her two fellow Jedi trainees [[Anakin Solo]] and [[Tahiri Veila]] accompanied Lyric. Shortly after the trio's arrival, they fell under attack by several native predators including an [[avril]], a [[reel]], a [[purella]] and several [[Raith (rodent)|raiths]]. However, Anakin and Tahiri fought and killed them all.<ref name="jjk2" />

Having survived, Lyric participated in the Ceremony which took place at a shallow cove in Sistra which led to a series of pools that dominated much of the mountain. At the end of the ceremony, Lyric's legs were replaced by tail slits and she breathed through gills, making her an Elder. Presumably, this also limited her activities as a Jedi to her homeworld.<ref name="jjk2" />

During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invaded Yavin 8 and destroyed all life. Lyric was among the dead, killed by a [[voxyn]], a bioengineered beast created to hunt Force-sensitive individuals.<ref name="sbs">''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Lyric's name and that of her species are presumably a pun; lyrics are the words of a song, while a melody is the tune to which they are sung.

[[Walter Jon Williams]] originally intended to use Lyric in his book ''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'', until he was informed that she had been killed in an earlier novel. Her role was then filled by the [[Anx/Legends|Anx]] [[Madurrin]].<ref name="JCF">{{JCFCite|url=posts/9067578|board=Literature|thread=The Official Walter Jon Williams Discussion Thread|user=Walterjon|date=2002-10-07|time=1:34 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20160527184801/http://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-walter-jon-williams-discussion-thread.5816776/page-25}}</ref>
